name: KLab Inc.
summary: KLab Inc., together with its subsidiaries, plans, develops, operates, and publishes online mobile games worldwide. It also supports game development projects by providing full or partial funding for creating games; and provides advice for mobile game development and platforms for game design, as well as offers mobile game software development toolkits and server infrastructure solutions. In addition, the company provides marketing strategies, such as promotional activities, IP acquisition, planning and operations assistance, and support for global launches. KLab Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
